name: Nadeem Nasir
title: Full Stack Web Developer
summary: Full Stack Web Developer focused on building practical web applications with ASP.NET Core, Angular, React, and SQL. Experienced in industrial monitoring systems, RESTful APIs, JWT-based authentication, and database-driven solutions, with a strong interest in clean user interfaces and reliable backend development.

projects.name: Colossys - Colony Textile Mill
projects.description: Built and maintained a production-grade full-stack web application for industrial monitoring using ASP.NET Core 9 and Angular 20, with real-time dashboards, reporting, authentication, role-based access control, background jobs, and database integration.
highlights: Developed secure RESTful Web APIs using ASP.NET Core and C# for real-time industrial monitoring features.
Implemented JWT-based authentication and role-based authorization, with Entity Framework Core integration.

projects.name: Inventory Management System
projects.description: Developed a basic Inventory Management System using ASP.NET Core Web API and C# to manage products, stock, sales, and purchase records.
highlights: Built RESTful Web APIs for CRUD operations, stock tracking, and transaction management.
Integrated SQL database operations to support efficient inventory monitoring and reporting.

projects.name: Job Sync - Web App
projects.description: Final Year Project | MNS-University of Agriculture, Multan
highlights: Developed a web application that allows employers to register, log in, and post job vacancies through a multi-step form.
Enabled candidates to browse, filter, and apply for multiple jobs through an intuitive UI.
Implemented frontend in React, connected backend via Supabase, and authentication using Clerk.
